equation_latex: log K_{oc} = 0.00028 + 0.983 log K_{ow}; ESB_{oc} = FCV K_{oc} 10^{-3}; SedS = ESB_{oc} f_{oc}
plain_language: Estimate organic-carbon partitioning from log Kow, convert a water chronic value to an organic-carbon-normalized sediment benchmark, then scale by sediment organic carbon.
unit_notes: FCV is entered in ug/L and converted by 1e-3 inside the equation.
applicability: Single-substance non-ionic organic pathway. Not valid for methylmercury or divalent metals.
review_notes: Equation matches current derivation implementation. Needs final source-level citation for Di Toro regression and EqP method.

plain_language: Back-calculate a sediment concentration from receptor toxicity, body weight, intake rate, bioaccumulation, and site-use fraction.
unit_notes: Default output is mg/kg dry sediment. MeHg path skips lipid normalization and uses the protein-normalized BSAF directly.
applicability: Single-substance wildlife or fish receptor screening pathway. Coastal-marine PAH bivalves apply the current x15 multiplier pending review.
review_notes: Formula matches current derivation implementation. Needs receptor-specific source review before approval.

plain_language: Compute the one-sided 95 percent coverage, 95 percent confidence upper tolerance limit from a background reference set.
unit_notes: Input and output use the same concentration unit, currently mg/kg.
applicability: Post-derivation background adjustment. Current K lookup is screening-grade until exact noncentral-t computation lands.
review_notes: Current implementation interpolates a small K table and flags clamping.
